author: Maxime Janton
subject: feat(publish-script): re-write as js script, allow beta releases (#2263)
body:
* feat(publish-script): re-write as js script, allow beta releases
* refactor(release): use strategy conditionnal
* feat(scripts/release): add rollback strategy
* refactor(release): use `return` keyword on rollback
* refactor(release): use `shelljs`
* feat(release): clean up node_modules before yarn
* feat(release): remove old script
* feat(release): make the new script run as cmd
* doc(CONTRIBUTING): add note to use `npm run` instead of `yarn run`
